title: Hosted Identity, Tenancy, and Context Enforcement
description: Move Enki identity, tenant, subject, domain, audience, purpose, and execution-context boundaries into the authorized hosted runtime and validate least-privilege behavior adversarially.
acceptance_criteria: Hosted authentication and identity resolution bind exact Enki boundary context
Cross-tenant, cross-subject, cross-domain, cross-audience, cross-purpose, and TEST-to-PRODUCTION escalation fail closed
Scoped credentials, revocation, expiry, rotation, and forged-identity paths are validated
Human-state controls remain stricter than generic tenant authorization
Hosted denial evidence is privacy-preserving and reconstructable

evidence.description: Versioned hosted identity and denial-evidence policy.
